Defines macros and routines for the ECMA Date built-in object in the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and constants related to the built-in `Date` object as specified in the ECMAScript Language Specification (ECMA-262). It uses preprocessor directives to define macros for object identifiers, object values, number values, and routines associated with the `Date` object. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the `Date` object, while the `OBJECT_VALUE` macro sets the prototype property of the `Date` object. The `NUMBER_VALUE` macro defines the length property of the `Date` object. The `ROUTINE` macros declare functions such as `parse`, `utc`, and `now`, which correspond to the `Date` object's methods. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent conflicts with other code.
